provisions.content:
POSITION LIMITS AND POSITION MANAGEMENT CONTROLS IN COMMODITY DERIVATIVES AND REPORTING

[ L.S.370.36

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.36
REGOLAMENTI DWAR POSITION LIMITS AND
POSITION MANAGEMENT CONTROLS IN
COMMODITY DERIVATIVES AND REPORTING*
3 ta’ Jannar, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 389 tal-2017, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 89 tal-2022
u 219 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
